index.title: Umusemuzi w'Ibikoresho
index.description: Resource Translator opens machine-translated pull requests for your resource files in any repo, in any format — powered by Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, or Google Cloud Translation.
index.socialTitle: Resource Translator — translate resource files automatically
index.badge: v3.0 — Azure, AWS & Google providers, Node 24, repo config
index.lede: Resource Translator opens machine-translated pull requests for your resource files using Azure, AWS, or Google — one unified action, one provider per run, official SDKs under the hood.
index.workflowTitle: Guhindura ni igikorwa c'akazi, si igikorwa c'ubuvuzi.
index.workflowBody: Shira ico gikorwa muri CI yawe isanzwe, uyiyereke kuri Azure, AWS, canke Google, hanyuma ureke repo yawe ivuge ururimi rwose wifuza.

formats.title: Six file formats
formats.body: Ingendo zo kuzunguruka {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, na {restext} hamwe n'imiterere ya byte.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Drop a {configPath} file for include globs, glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

glossary.title: Glossary-aware
glossary.body: Funga amazina y'ibicuruzwa hamwe n'amajambo y'ibicuruzwa ukoresheje regex y'umupaka w'ijambo rigenga {cpp}, {dotnet} n'abagenzi.

dryRun.title: Swimwear + Swimwear
dryRun.body: Preview translations without writing files, or surface every error as a warning while you iterate.

outputs.title: PR-friendly outputs
outputs.body: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, na {hasNewTranslations} zishika mu buryo butaziguye muri create-pull-request.

sdk.title: Azure, AWS & Google
sdk.body: Hitamwo umukinyi umwe kuri buri run. Imwe yose ikoreshwa na SDK yayo yemewe ({azureSdk}, {awsSdk}, {googleSdk}) hamwe n'igerageza ryikora kuri {statusCodes} - nta HTTP izunguruka n'intoki. {esbuild}-bundled, audit-clean.

workflowPreview.body: Amabanga atatu, imirongo ine, kandi repo yawe ikoresha indimi nyinshi mu gice gikurikira.

cta.title: Woba witeguriye kwiyandikisha kuri autopilot?
cta.body: Urufunguzo rumwe rw'abatanga - Azure, AWS, canke Google - hamwe na dosiye imwe y'akazi. Umuhinduzi w'ivyiyumviro ni we atunganya ibisigaye.

getting-started.title: Gutangura
getting-started.lede: Ongeraho dosiye y'akazi, uyiyerekeze ku vyemezo vyawe vya Azure AI Translator, hanyuma igikorwa kizosuzumisha repo y'amadosiye y'ururimi rw'inkomoko hanyuma gisohore abavukanyi bahinduwe.

provision.title: Provision an Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Create an Azure AI Translator resource in the Azure portal, then store the following as GitHub repository secrets so the workflow can read them:

resource.title: Commit a source resource file
resource.body: Resource files use the {namingConvention} convention. Nk {sourceFile} akarorero, {frFile}, {deFile}, n'ibindi.

output.title: Genzura ibisohoka
output.body: Iyo igikorwa kirangiye, igikorwa cerekana ibintu bitatu ushobora gushiraho mu bisobanuro vya PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, na {hasNewTranslations}. Yandika kandi incamake ya Markdown ku rupapuro rw'akazi biciye kuri {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Intambwe zikurikira
nextSteps.recipes: See recipes for monorepos, custom glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

providers.title: Abatanga ubuhinduzi
providers.lede: Choose one translation provider per run - Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, or Google Cloud Translation - behind a single, unified API surface. Umuhinduzi yigenza kimwe; Ibiharuro gusa biratandukanye.
providers.backwardCompatible: Fully backward compatible: {provider} defaults to {azure}, so existing Azure workflows keep working unchanged — no edits required.

selecting.title: Guhitamwo umutanga
selecting.body: Gushiraho {provider} input kuri {azure} (default), {aws}, canke {google}, hanyuma uce utanga impapuro z'uwo mutangabuhamya. Only one provider is used per action call; the action deterministically delegates to the matching SDK behind a factory.

aws.name: AWS Translate
aws.credentials: OIDC / default chain, or awsAccessKeyId + awsSecretAccessKeyKey; awsRegion

azure.title: Azure AI Translator (default)
azure.body: Uwutanga amakosa. Tanga ibikoresho vy'ubuhinduzi bwa Azure AI hanyuma ukore {subscriptionKey}, {endpoint}, kandi ku bw'{region}. Ayo ni amwe mu mashirahamwe asanzwe akoresha mu bijanye n'imigenderanire n'ayandi makungu.

aws.title: AWS Translate
aws.body: Koresha {sdk}. Hitamwo OIDC ukoresheje {configureAwsCredentials} kugira ngo ntihagire ibanga rimara igihe kirekire ribikwa - igikorwa gisoma umuyoboro w'indangamuntu wa AWS SDK. Ku rundi ruhande, rekisa {awsAccessKeyId} {awsSecretAccessKey} mu buryo butomoye. A region is always needed, via {awsRegion} or the {awsRegionEnv} environment variable.
aws.keysNote: Kugira ngo ukoreshe imfunguzo za statique aho gukoresha OIDC, manuka intambwe ya {configureAwsCredentials} hanyuma uce {awsAccessKeyId} / {awsSecretAccessKey} (via {secrets}) wongeyeko {awsRegion}.

google.title: Google Cloud Translation
google.body: Koresha {sdk} (v2). Authenticate with either an API key ({googleApiKey}) or a service-account JSON credential ({googleCredentials}). Tanga imwe; An optional {googleProjectId} is inferred from the credential when omitted.

mapping.title: Intent-specifier mapping
mapping.body: Ibiharuro vy'ibiharuro vy'ibiharuro biboneka aho bingana n'ivyo bihari. Ibindi vyose bisubira ku makosa yumvikana, ku buryo inyifato iguma ihindagurika.
mapping.caption: Intent-specifier mapping across providers

locales.title: Locale codes differ per provider
locales.body: Buri mutanga ukoresha kode zayo bwite (nk'akarorero igishinwa coroshe {azureCode} kuri Azure, {awsCode} kuri AWS, na {googleCode} kuri Google). Codes zica muri as-is kandi zitwara amazina y'amadosiye y'ibisohokayandikiro, rero hitamwo ibiciro {toLocales} umutanga watoye.

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.lede: Express defaults once in the repository config file and let every workflow inherit them. Action inputs always win when both are provided
configuration.intro: Hindura inzira ukoresheje {configPath} input nimba ukeneye ikibanza kidasanzwe.

fields.sourceLocale: Subira ku murongo {sourceLocale} mu gihe utabikoze. Also forwarded to Translator as {fromLocale} so short strings are not autodetected.
fields.toLocales: Canke umurongo w'umurongo utandukanye na koma.
fields.includeExclude: Glob patterns tested against absolute and workspace-relative paths.
fields.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — your industry/domain knob (legal, medical, marketing tone, etc.). Sent as {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Kudahana {plain}. Use {html} only if your resource values contain real HTML fragments.
fields.profanityAction: Ni gute wahindura imvugo y'ikirundi mu majambo y'ubuhinduzi?
fields.allowFallback: Set to {false} to fail the translation when your {categoryId} has no deployment for a target locale instead of falling back to the general model.
fields.maxRetries: Maximum retry attempts on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}). Kudakora {defaultRetries}. Guhamagara HTTP kuri buri busabe ni {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Suzumiya Haruka Ayase Kudahana {defaultBackoff}. Umutwe wa {retryAfter} wa Azure uraterwa iteka igihe uriho; otherwise jittered exponential backoff is used, capped at this value.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Kudahana {true}. Mu gihe bimaze gukorwa, ibimenyetso nka {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} na HTML birasubirizwa n'ibimenyetso vya sentinel imbere yo guhindurwa hanyuma bigasubizwa inyuma y'aho. Disable only when source intentionally contains placeholder-shaped literals.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Extra regex patterns (without delimiters) added to the default placeholder set, e.g. {angleToken} for custom token syntax. Invalid regexes are ignored.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Uburyo bwa Glob buhuye n'imfunguzo zo ku rwego rwa parser (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext key). Imfunguzo zihuza zikurwa mu busabe hanyuma zigaca hamwe n'agaciro kazo k'inkomoko zibikwa.

steps.actionInputs: The action reads explicit inputs from the workflow.
steps.config: It loads the YAML config from {configPath}.
steps.precedence: Ku murima wose uhuriweko, inyifato iratsinda; otherwise the YAML value is used.
steps.validation: Ibiciro vy'ibiharuro vy'ibiharuro vy' Invalid enums (e.g. {invalidEnum}) cause the action to fail fast with a clear message.

tone.heading: Tone and industry, in plain terms
tone.body: Azure AI Translator v3 API nta tone imwe ifise. Ibice bibiri bihuriye hamwe kugira ngo biguha igice kinini c'ubugenzuzi bumwe:
tone.industryBody: Use {categoryId} to point at an Azure {customTranslatorLink} category trained on your own corpus — legal, technical, medical, marketing, or anything else. Ico nico kimenyetso gikomeye cane c'amajwi, ijwi ry'ikirango hamwe n'amajambo.
tone.surfaceBody: Use the {glossaryLink} to lock brand names and product terms verbatim, and use {profanityAction} to scrub profane terms when targeting localization for young audiences.

inputs.title: Inputs & Outputs
inputs.lede: Buri kintu cose kiboneka kandi muri repo config file. Mu gihe vyompi bimaze gushirwaho, inyifato y'igikorwa iratsinda.
inputs.configurationIntro: See {configurationLink} for the YAML schema and loading order.

items.sourceLocale: Source locale (e.g. {en}) used to find resource files such as {sourceGlob}. Urwo rubanza narwo rukaba rwarungitswe n'umushikiranganji w'intwaro yo hagati mu gihugu nk'uko {fromLocale}.

providerInputs.heading: Provider selection & credentials
providerInputs.caption: Provider selection and per-vendor credentials
providerInputs.intro: Choose one provider per run with {provider}. Tanga gusa impapuro z'umutanga watowe - raba {providersLink} guide for full setup.

items.provider: Traduction: {azure} (default), {aws}, or {google}. Umwe gusa ni we akoresha imbuga ngurukanabumenyi.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Bisaba {azure}. Pass via {secrets}.
items.endpoint: Azure Translator endpoint URL, e.g. {endpointUrl}. Bikenewe kugira ngo {azure}.
items.awsAccessKeyId: Ikebukuro Ikebukuro Key ID Optional — omit (with {awsSecretAccessKey}) to use the AWS default credential chain / OIDC. Pass via {secrets}.
items.awsSecretAccessKey: Ibanga ry'ibanga rya AWS Ategerezwa gutangwa hamwe n'{awsAccessKeyId}. Pass via {secrets}.
items.awsSessionToken: Optional AWS session token for temporary credentials. Pass via {secrets}.
items.awsRegion: Akarere ka Rusizi mu Murenge wa Busasamana mu Karere ka Nyarugenge ({regionExample} Ifoto/Umurengezi R) Birakenewe {aws} kiretse {awsRegionEnv} bitegekanijwe mu bidukikije.
items.googleApiKey: Google Cloud API key. Tanga iyi OR {googleCredentials} {google}. Pass via {secrets}.
items.googleCredentials: Google Cloud service-account key as a JSON string. Tanga iyi OR {googleApiKey} {google}. Pass via {secrets}.
items.googleProjectId: Optional Google Cloud project id. Usually inferred from the service-account credential.

items.region: Translator resource region (omit for global resources).
items.toLocales: Traduzione Yamagishi Yemera urupapuro rwa JSON ({jsonArray}) canke inyuguti zitandukanywa na koma.
items.include: Newline-separated glob patterns; Ibiharuro bihuza gusa ni vyo bihindurwa.
items.exclude: Newline-separated glob patterns; matching files are skipped (applied after include).
items.configPath: Inzira ya YAML config file (ijanye n'umuzi w'akazi).
items.dryRun: Mu gihe {true}, nuce uhindura ivyiyumviro vyawe n'ivyiyumviro vyawe, ariko ntugire ico wanditse.
items.failOnError: Mu gihe {true} amakosa atari yitezwe; Mu gihe {false}, amakosa aba ari ingabisho.

translatorInputs.heading: Azure Translator request inputs
translatorInputs.intro: These map directly into Azure AI Translator v3 query parameters and apply to the azure provider. textType and profanityAction are also mapped to AWS/Google where an equivalent exists (see the providers guide); Izindi zose ni Azure-only. Umwe wese ni we yihitiyemwo; the Translator defaults apply when unset.
translatorInputs.caption: Azure Translator request inputs

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — the industry/domain/tone knob. Yoherejwe nk'uko {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} canke {html}. Use {html} only when your resource values are real HTML fragments.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked} canke {deleted}. Raba ingene amajambo y'urukozasoni akoreshwa mu majambo y'ubuhinduzi.
items.profanityMarker: {asterisk} canke {tag}. Ni ikintu gihambaye gusa igihe {profanityAction} {marked}.
items.allowFallback: Mu gihe {false}, umuhinduzi asubiza ikosa aho gusubira muri sisitemu rusangi mu gihe {categoryId} yawe idafise ikibanza c'ihangiro.

resilienceInputs.heading: Resilience & placeholder protection
resilienceInputs.intro: Ivyo vyinjizwa bigenzura ingene igikorwa gikora igihe Umuhinduzi ahagarika ubusabe bwawe n'ingene akingira ibimenyetso vy'ikibanza nka {mustache} canke {indexZero} kugira ngo ntibibe vyoroshe mu gihe c'ubuhinduzi.
resilienceInputs.caption: Resilience and placeholder protection inputs

items.maxRetries: Maximum retry attempts on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}). Igitigiri c'abahamagara HTTP kuri buri sabwa ni {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Cap (in milliseconds) on any single backoff sleep. Ico gikorwa giha icubahiro umutwe w'inyishu ya {retryAfter} wa Azure mu gihe kiriho; otherwise it uses jittered exponential backoff capped at this value.
items.protectPlaceholders: Mu gihe {true} (default), placeholders nka {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} na HTML zisubirizwa n'ibimenyetso vya sentinel imbere yo guhindurwa hanyuma bigasubizwa nyuma. Disable only when your source intentionally contains literal placeholder-shaped text that should be translated.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Newline-separated regexes (without delimiters) yongerewe kuri placeholder set, nk'akarorero {angleToken} ya syntaxe y'ibimenyetso bisanzwe.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Newline-separated glob patterns matched against parser-level keys (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext key). Imfunguzo zihuza zikurwa ku busabe bw'umusemuzi hanyuma zigaca hamwe n'agaciro kazo k'inkomoko zibikwa.

items.summaryDetails: Markdown summary suitable for a PR body or job summary.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} igihe hasohotse imwe canke nyinshi muri Bibiliya nshasha?

formats.title: Imiterere y'amadosiye
formats.lede: Six round-trippable resource formats. The action reads each source-locale file, translates the values, and writes a sibling per target locale.
formats.namingConvention: Izo nyandiko zose zikoresha {namingConvention} yo kwita izina.

resx.blurb: XML-based .NET resource files. Translates the inner text of each {dataValue} node, keeping comments and metadata.

xliff.blurb: OASIS XLIFF 2.0 documents. Hindura {source} yose hanyuma wandike ivyavuyemwo mu {target} bihuye n'ivyo, ugashiraho {trgLang} y'akarere.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object files. Translates each {msgid} / {msgidPlural} into {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural} forms.

json.blurb: Arbitrary JSON files. Ibiharuro vy'ibihimba vy'irondoka bihindurwa n'inyuguti ya {delimiter} kugira ngo bihindurwe, hanyuma bisubire guhindurwa. Imfunguzo z'amadolari ({dottedKey}) zibikwa mu mvugo.

ini.blurb: Simple {keyValue} files (Win32-style INI or any flat config). Umutwe w'ibice hamwe n'ivyiyumviro vyagumye.

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI text resources — flat {keyValue} pairs used as a textual companion to {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Garanties z'urugendo rwo kuzunguruka
roundTrip.body: The test suite verifies byte-for-byte round-tripping for representative fixtures of every format. If a format quirk breaks round-tripping in your codebase, please {issueLink} with a minimal sample.

recipes.title: Ibifungurwa
recipes.lede: Common patterns for shipping translations: monorepos, glossaries, custom categories, dry runs, and tone control.

pullRequest.heading: Fungura urupapuro rw'umutsindo inyuma ya buri rukino

glossary.heading: Glossary for brand names and product terms
glossary.body: Amajambo y'imvugo akoreshwa {after} guhindura, gutyo imashini ihindurwa n'imashini iguma igumana ikirango ukunda n'igihe igishushanyo cahinduwe n'insiguro y'insigarirazina.

customCategory.heading: Custom Translator category (industry / domain)
customCategory.body: Menyereza umugwi wa Azure {customTranslatorLink} kuri corpus ifata imvugo n'imvugo y'uruganda rwawe (amategeko, ubuvuzi, kwamamaza, ubuhinga bw'imbere mu gihugu, n'ibindi) hanyuma uce utanga ID yayo ukoresheje {categoryId}. This is the strongest tone lever Azure offers.

tone.heading: Tone control + strict fallback
tone.body: Combine a Custom Translator {categoryId} with {profanityAction} and {allowFallbackFalse} to enforce a consistent voice and fail the workflow if the selected category does not have a deployment for one of your target locales.

dryRun.heading: Suzumiya Haruka
dryRun.body: The action still emits summary outputs and a step summary, but no files are written. Huza na {failOnErrorFalse} kugira ngo ugaragaze ikibazo cose nk'ingabisho mu gihe uriko urasubiramwo.

faq.title: Ibibazo bikunze kubazwa
faq.lede: Inyishu zihuta z'ibibazo bikunze kwishura igihe umuntu yipfuza gukora ico gikorwa.

azure.heading: Ni gute igikorwa kivugana na Azure?
azure.body: Biciye ku {azureSdkLink} SDK ya Microsoft, yashizwe ku {corePipelineLink}. Ivyo biguha uburyo bwo kugerageza {statusCodes}, uburyo bwo gusaba no kwishura, hamwe no kugenzura umutwe ku buntu - ibintu vyose vyahora ari ukuhamagara {axios} n'ukuboko. Ibiharuro vy'ibiharuro (ibisohokayandikiro, ibisohokayandikiro, ibisohokayandikishije) ntibihinduka.

tone.heading: Ni kubera iki rimwe na rimwe Bibiliya ihindura ivyiyumviro bidasanzwe canke bitagira ishingiro?
tone.body: Imashini y'ubuhinduzi ntiyigera ikoreshwa mu buryo bw'intumbero rusangi. Udupfukamunwa dutatu turafasha: {glossaryLink} y'amajambo akomeye, {customTranslatorLink} y'ivyiyumviro vyatunganijwe neza ku majwi yawe n'imvugo yawe, hamwe n'{profanityAction} wo gusukura canke gusukura imvugo y'urukozasoni.

duplicateFiles.heading: Ni gute nakwirinda guhindura urupapuro rumwe incuro zibiri?
duplicateFiles.body: Trigger the workflow on {paths} that match your source-locale files only, e.g. {sourceGlob}. Ico gikorwa kandi kirimwo akayunguruzo kayo ka per-trigger file mu gihe {githubToken} yashizweho, bigagabanya akazi kuri dosiye muri commit iheruka.

offline.heading: Ndashobora gukora ico gikorwa hanze y'umurongo?
offline.body: Si vy'ukuri — Azure AI Translator ni ubwonko bw'igihe c'iterambere. But you can run with {dryRunTrue} to validate parsing and config without making any HTTP requests for translation.

node.heading: What Node version does the action run on?
node.body: v3 ikora kuri GitHub Actions {nodeRuntime} runtime. JavaScript ihuza na Node 20, 22 na 24, ivyo bikaba ari vyo CI igerageza.

dist.heading: Ayo {distDir} y'inkozi z'ikibi ava he?
dist.body: GitHub JS actions send their compiled JS in the repository. The {distBuild} workflow rebuilds it after every merge to {mainBranch} if it would drift, and {distCheck} blocks PRs that would land out-of-date output.

formats.heading: Tuvuge iki ku bindi bikoresho vy'ubutunzi?
formats.body: Uno musi: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} if you need another — the parser interface is small (parse → map → apply translations → format) and contributions are welcome.

translations.title: Traductions
translations.lede: This page is translated by Resource Translator itself, on every push to main, into every language Azure AI Translators supports.
translations.statusPending: {translatedCount} currently render — {pendingCount} pending the next {workflowName} run.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Rondera izina ry'ikirundi, izina ry'ikirundi canke izina ry'ikirundi...

steps.workflow: Push that touch it kick off {workflowLink}, which runs {thisAction} against itself.
steps.fanOut: Ibikorwa bija kuri buri kibanza gishigikiwe na Azure AI Translator (catunganijwe mu {configPath}) kandi kigatanga {messagesLocaleJson} y'umuvukanyi kuri buri ntego.
steps.pullRequest: Igisata c'ubuvuzi bw'Ivyabona vya Yehova gitegerezwa gutanguzwa n'ibitabu bishasha. Kuyihuza isubiramwo uru rupapuro hamwe n'amakarata yuzuye.

translations.poweredBy: Powered by Resource Translator and Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Gutanga intererano
contributing.lede: Bug reports, feature requests, and pull requests are all welcome. Ico gikorwa ni gito bihagije ku buryo gifasha abatanga intererano ubwa mbere.

steps.extension: Add the file extension to {translationFileSchemes} in {finderFile}.
steps.tests: Write round-trip tests for parse → format and applyTranslations.

coverage.heading: Ibipimo vy'ubwishingizi
coverage.body: The Jest config enforcing minimum coverage. Itegeko rishasha ritegerezwa kugumiza imirongo + imirongo iri hejuru ya 78% kandi ikora hejuru ya 90%. Wongerako ibipimo n'ibipimo hamwe n'impinduka zawe.

docsSite.heading: Urubuga rw'inyandiko
docsSite.body: The {docsDir} folder is an Astro 6 + Tailwind v4 project. Run {npmInstall} there once, then {npmRunDev} for local preview. The {pagesWorkflow} workflow sends docs to GitHub Pages on every merge.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.lede: Incamake y'ibisohokayandikiro vyo ku rwego rwo hejuru. The canonical, authoritative changelog lives in CHANGELOG.md in the repository.
changelog.fullRecord: Raba {changelogLink} kugira ubone iyo nkuru yose.

releases.v302: {label} Translator requests now pin {apiVersion} on the wire for both {translate} and {languages}. Azure SDK yubaha gusa uburyo bwa api-version yo ku rwego rw'umukiriya igihe credential yemejwe; Ico gikorwa kigenzura ubusabe kuri buri busabe biciye ku mitwe y'imitwe, ku buryo ubwo buryo bwakuweho bucece, hanyuma ubusabe buhagarikwa kuri version ya API ya preview amasezerano y'{translate} yanse umubiri hamwe na HTTP 400 (code y'amakosa {code}). Kirangira ikosorwa ryatanguye muri 3.0.1.
releases.v301: {label} The {translate} request body is now a bare JSON array of {textItem} items instead of a wrapped {inputs} object, matching the v3.0 REST contract. Ubwayo ivyo ntivyasubije ubuhinduzi — raba 3.0.2.

items.newInputs: New inputs: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, plus advanced Translator knobs {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, and {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Source locale ubu na yo irungikwa kuri Translator kuko {fromLocale} ku buryo imigozi migufi itashobora kumenyekana.
items.resilience: {label} automatic retry on transient HTTP responses ({statusCodes}) honoring Azure's {retryAfter} header — falls back to jittered exponential backoff when absent. Tunable via {maxRetries} and {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} tokens like {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} and HTML entities are wrapped in sentinels before translation and restored later, so Translator stops mangling i18next/Mustache/Handlebars/.NET/printf placeholders. Toggle via {protectPlaceholders}; Kwagura hamwe n'{customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} {noTranslatePatterns} nshasha itanga imfunguzo zihuza n'ubusabe bw'umusemuzi burundu (zibungabunga agaciro k'amazina y'ibicuruzwa, kode z'amakosa, n'ibindi). Matches glob patterns against parser-level keys (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext key). {issue}
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Astro + Tailwind v4 docs site with view transitions and Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA pass. Logo glyphs converted to paths so they never longer fail color-contrast against gradient stops, the floating {backToTop} button uses {inert} while hidden (instead of an {ariaHidden} toggle that left it tabbable), {formatsAstro} sections no longer collide with their auto-generated heading IDs, three locale cards now expose BCP-47-valid {lang} attributes ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), duplicate {documentation} landmark labels are disambiguated between sidebar and footer,  kandi buri meza y'amakuru kuri {inputs}/{configuration} yoherezwa hamwe n'ibisobanuro vy'umusomyi wa ecran.
items.inlineCode: {label} Docs prose {codeElement} now wears the warm/amber theme accent — different from the brand→accent palette used for links and headings.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
